not_null_columns.description: Columns that must contain no null values
not_null_columns.title: Not Null Columns

min_distinct_columns.description: Columns to check for minimum distinct value count (parallel to min_distinct_counts)
min_distinct_columns.title: Min Distinct Columns

min_distinct_counts.description: Required minimum distinct count per column (parallel to min_distinct_columns)
min_distinct_counts.title: Min Distinct Counts

min_value_columns.description: Columns to check for a minimum numeric value (parallel to min_values)
min_value_columns.title: Min Value Columns

min_values.description: Minimum allowed value per column (parallel to min_value_columns)
min_values.title: Min Values
